name: cut
description: Cut plane for clipping contact visualization. Shows only contacts on one side of a defined plane.

keywords.description: Enable cut plane on contact plot item
keywords.syntax: cut active on type plane surface on front on back off origin (<x>,<y>,<z>) normal (<nx>,<ny>,<nz>)
examples: cut active on type plane surface on front on back off origin (0,0,0) normal (0,1,0)
cut active on type plane surface on front off back on origin (0,0,0) normal (0,0,1)

available_parameters.active: on | off — enable or disable the cut plane
available_parameters.surface: on | off — show the cut surface
available_parameters.front: on | off — show material in front of cut plane
available_parameters.back: on | off — show material behind cut plane
available_parameters.origin: (x,y,z) — a point on the cut plane
available_parameters.normal: (nx,ny,nz) — normal direction of the cut plane

keywords.notes: Typically front=on back=off to view one half, or front=off back=on for the other.

keywords.description: Disable cut plane, restoring full visualization

usage_in_creation: Cut cannot be inlined in 'item create'. First create the item, then use 'item modify' to add the cut plane.
usage_in_modification: plot "<name>" item modify <id> cut active on type plane surface on front off back on origin (0,0,0) normal (0,1,0)

legend_settings.description: Cut plane legend sub-settings exported in datafile
legend_settings.example: legend ... cut ... title active on size 44 family 'Arial' style normal color 'black' ... origin active off ... normal active off ... orientation active off

notes: Cut plane syntax is identical across ball, contact, and wall item types.
IMPORTANT: cut parameters must be set via 'plot item modify', not inline in 'plot item create'. Create the item first, then modify to add the cut.
